name: STRATEGIC ACQUISITIONS INC /NV/
business: The company is a private lending company that provides digital asset backed loan service to businesses. Its target customers are small businesses and individuals that hold intangible assets including digital currencies seeking loans secured by such assets. Currently, it only provides loans to businesses and individuals outside of the United States, mainly in Asia and Europe.
sellsTo: businesses and individuals outside the United States
small businesses and individuals holding digital assets

exposures.sentence: The Company is a private lending company that provides digital asset backed loan service to businesses.
Our target customers are small businesses and individuals that hold intangible assets including digital currencies seeking loans secured by such assets.

catalysts.event: All loan receivable issued were settled by borrowers and lending operations temporarily ceased
catalysts.sentence: During July 2024, all loan receivable issued were settled by borrowers and we have temporarily ceased lending operations from this date as of the date this SEC filing.
